options.name: <pins_and_ports_list>
options.description: Limits the reporting to specified pins and ports

options.name: -all
options.description: Specifies that the Logic Constant Value table report set_logic constants, constants in the netlist, and output pins with a constant function

options.name: -dir
options.description: Specifies that the report include the direction of the pin or port

options.name: -nosplit
options.description: Specifies that reports with long names will not be split into multiple lines

options.name: -propagated
options.description: Generates a report that includes all constant pins, including pins with propagated constants

options.name: -sequential_propagation
options.description: Print Instances with user asserted sequential propagation

options.name: -tcl_list
options.description: Produces the report in Tcl list format instead of a tabular format

options.name: -verbose
options.description: Generates a report in which each pin is listed on a separate line with a cause

options.name: -view
options.description: Generates a case analysis report for the specified analysis view only. By default all active views are reported (string, optional) > <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to specified file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to specified file
